features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Enjoy a refreshing citrus fragrance every time you open the door
description: Product Description Finish Freshener is a perfectly simple way to keep your dishwasher smelling clean and fresh. With dirty dishes sitting in your machine and unwanted build-up in the filter, nasty odours can easily start to appear - this effective Dishwasher Freshener leaves an invigorating lemon and lime scent in your machine, so you get a breath of refreshing citrus every time you open the door. The Freshener's dual chambers combine to keep the fragrance working wash after wash, but it won't leave a strong smell on your dishes. The Freshener is also available with a lemon scent and our Odour Stop Freshener works by eliminating odours without leaving a fragrance behind. Finish Dishwasher Freshener is incredibly simple to use - just remove it from the packaging and either clip the device onto the cutlery basket or hang it from the upper rack. The fragrance is automatically released when you run a dishwasher cycle, so you can just pop it in your machine and let the Freshener get to work. Make sure you check on occasion to see if there's still liquid inside and simply replace the device once it runs out; it should last for around 60 washes. Freshens your dishwasher with a cool, clean Lemon & Lime scent. Its special dual chambers work together so that every time you open your dishwasher you get a breath of refreshing Lemon & Lime scent. Ingredients Dual Action Liquid Directions Usage Instructions: Clip Finish Freshener onto a rack or hang it from the upper rack of the dishwasher, without it blocking the spray arms. Once the liquid inside disappears (approx. 60 washes) replace the whole gadget. Certain kinds of plastic material tend to smell of the perfume if washed together with the dishwasher freshener. Safety Warning Keep away from children. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. After contact with skin, wash immediately with water. Do not re-use empty container. See more
